title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!
